name: card
title: Card
description: Shared card chrome — width + matching min-height tokens, header (title + actions slot), and a flex body that fills leftover space. Compose from settings and data-viz cards.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Card. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

heading.description: Section title in the card header.

cardWidth.description: Width token; also sets host min-height to the matching --dimension-card-height-*.

appearance.description: Chrome recipe — editing applies the settings edit wash.
